description: A skill object provides supplemental information about a skill

displayName.description: The name of the skill as it should be displayed in the user interface. For example, 'Manage Risk Register'.

description.description: A brief summary of what the skill does and when it applies.

category.description: The grouping category of the skill. For example, 'risk assessment', 'compliance' or 'incident response'.

relatedTools.description: The MCP tool names that the skill's instructions reference. Lets AI agents see which tools are relevant without parsing the instructions.

title: Skill
